evals.expected_output: Displays a formatted dashboard showing sprint history, backlog, dissent register, and decisions. Handles missing files gracefully with clear messaging rather than errors.
Shows only the sprint backlog section. Focuses output. Does not show dissent or decisions.
Shows only the dissent register section. Handles the case where no dissent has been recorded gracefully.

evals.prompt: What's the current status of the project? What sprints have we run and what's next?
evals.expected_output: Uses shell-injected content to surface live sprint history and backlog. Does not fabricate sprint data. If files are missing, explains how to set up the framework.
Shows only the decisions section from research/DECISIONS.md. Handles missing file gracefully.
